name: Lord of the Missing Barrows
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>至</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミッシング・バロウズ
name_jp_tl: Missing Barrows, Demon King of the Highest Heaven
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 3 cards from your GY (1 monster, 1 Spell, and 1 Trap). If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can banish 1 monster and 2 Spells/Traps from your opponent's field and/or GY. You can only use this effect of "Lord of the Missing Barrows" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 3 cards from your GY (1 monster, 1 Spell, and 1 Trap). If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can banish 1 monster and 2 Spells/Traps from your opponent's field and/or GY. You can only use this effect of "Lord of the Missing Barrows" once per turn.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 3 cards from your GY (1 monster, 1 Spell, and 1 Trap). If this card is Special Summoned from the hand: You can banish 1 monster and 2 Spells/Traps from your opponent's field and/or GY. You can only use this effect of "Lord of the Missing Barrows" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
